lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. It has been exceptionally well-maintained and remains in like-new condition.
Good condition.

Check out this dependable ride that’s ready to get you where you need to go! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years of service, it remains a solid and functional vehicle with plenty of life left. It’s a fantastic choice for anyone looking for a reliable daily driver at an accessible price point. With a little bit of care, this car will continue to be a great companion on the road!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work. The exterior shows heavy wear, including several large dents, noticeable rust on the door panels, and fading clear coat throughout. Inside, the interior has sustained considerable damage, with torn upholstery and a non-functional infotainment system. Mechanically, the engine requires a major tune-up, the transmission shifts roughly, and the brakes are near the end of their life. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a project car or a source for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is suitable as a functional daily driver, though it does show its age. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, but it has a minor oil leak and the suspension is beginning to feel a bit loose over bumps. The exterior has several noticeable dings, some paint fading on the roof, and a small patch of surface rust on the rear wheel well. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows significant wear, and while the air conditioning and radio work perfectly, the power locks can be temperamental. It is a solid, roadworthy vehicle for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics, but potential buyers should budget for new tires and a brake service in the near future.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and requires major repairs. The exterior shows substantial damage and rust, and the interior is heavily worn and damaged.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience and consistent reliability. Our comprehensive inspection process confirms that all mechanical systems operate at a high standard, ensuring this automobile meets our rigorous criteria for quality and professional excellence.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m looking for a new home for this absolute gem! She’s been such a reliable ride and is in wonderful shape, just waiting for her next big adventure. Whether you’re commuting or heading out for a weekend getaway, this car is ready to roll and looks fantastic doing it. I’ve taken really good care of her, so you can drive away with a smile! Let’s chat and get you behind the wheel! ✨

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies. It has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a VANOS system refresh and rod bearing replacement. The chassis integrity is secured with a reinforced rear subframe, and the 6-speed Getrag manual transmission shifts with tactile precision. Equipped with a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential and a refreshed suspension setup, this car delivers the analog feedback and lateral grip enthusiasts crave. While presenting with minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age
Used car in good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean interior and exterior. Runs well.

This premium SUV represents a fantastic balance of luxury and utility, maintained with a high standard of care. The exterior paint retains a deep luster, showing only minor signs of road use consistent with a well-loved vehicle. Inside, the cabin remains a smoke-free environment with supple leather seating and a fully functional suite of modern technology features. Mechanically, the car is in strong form, offering a smooth, responsive drive and a complete service history that reflects its reliable nature. It is a solid, dependable choice for a discerning buyer looking for high-end comfort and performance at a sensible value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic, this unit delivers a refined driving experience. Every aspect of this automobile has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. It stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership, offering exceptional value for those who demand excellence without compromise.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this motorcar offers consistent performance and a sophisticated presence. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and proven reliability.

Hey there! I’m so excited to help this beauty find a new home! It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in wonderful shape, perfect for your daily commutes or weekend adventures. It runs smoothly and has been really well-loved, so you can just hop in and go. I’ve taken great care of it, and I can't wait for you to see how great it drives. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory Variable M Differential Lock. The chassis remains composed thanks to a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed suspension featuring upgraded bushings for improved lateral stiffness. Mechanical highlights include a recent Double-VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement, ensuring the internal valvetrain and bottom end are within optimal tolerances. While the exterior displays minor road patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical synchronization and throttle response remain exceptionally sharp. This is a mechanically sound specimen optimized for peak performance and tactile feedback.
Used car in good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable daily driver. No mechanical issues.

Experience the perfect blend of reliability and style with this well-maintained vehicle. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, showing only light, expected character from the road, while the cabin remains a clean, comfortable environment with all features functioning flawlessly. Beneath the hood, the engine performs with consistent strength, backed by a history of timely oil changes and preventative care. With its smooth gear transitions and precise steering, this car delivers a confident ride that feels as good as it looks. It is a solid, honest example of a driver’s car, ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable enjoyment.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which has been meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance and reliability. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, this model offers a sophisticated driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer who prioritizes both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal.

We are proud to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a synthesis of reliability and performance. This unit exhibits a consistent history of professional care, ensuring its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal remain at a high standard. A definitive example of lasting value within its class, it offers a sophisticated driving experience and remains a testament to superior engineering and attentive ownership.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved over the years. It's been super reliable and still looks great inside and out. Perfect for someone who wants a quality car without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love it!

Offering a driver-focused BMW M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six powerplant. This specimen delivers exceptional linear power through its six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS variable valve timing system. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal traction. The chassis remains taut with a reinforced rear subframe and upgraded bushings, ensuring precise turn-in and lateral stability. While displaying minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical integrity is robust, featuring a recently serviced cooling system and documented valve clearance adjustment. A true enthusiast’s machine optimized for the apex.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers the perfect blend of reliability and style. The exterior presents beautifully with a deep finish, showing only minor, age-appropriate character marks that do not detract from its overall presence. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the upholstery is well-preserved, and every electronic component—from the climate control to the premium audio system—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a rigorous service schedule and recent fluid changes. It drives smooth and tight, with plenty of life left in the tires and brakes. This is a dependable, honest car that has been cared for by a detail-oriented owner, ready for its next chapter.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a standard of consistent care and mechanical integrity. This unit has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for reliability and performance. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust drivetrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for those who prioritize long-term value and proven durability.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard, balancing performance with enduring reliability. The exterior retains its luster, while the cabin offers a pristine environment conducive to both comfort and command. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this unit stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains a superior selection for the professional motorist.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it—perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend road trips! It's been well-loved and consistently maintained, so it runs like a dream. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Come take it for a spin!

This E92 M3 features the high-revving S65 4.0L V8, utilizing individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS to achieve a 414hp output at its 8,400 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission to a Variable M Differential Lock, ensuring exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis maintains its composure with Electronic Damping Control (EDC), while recent service includes documented rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator refurbishment. This is a mechanically sound driver’s car with a linear torque curve and a chassis tuned for technical apexes, showing only minor cosmetic patina consistent with its performance history.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though a few minor stone chips on the front bumper reflect its honest history on the road. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin with supple leather seating that shows only minimal signs of use on the driver-side bolster. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has been serviced regularly, providing a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and confident braking. With a set of high-tread tires and a clean service history, this car is prepared for many more miles of dependable service. It offers a premium driving experience for the discerning buyer who values both aesthetics and performance.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, the automobile features a refined interior and a robust powertrain that has been thoroughly inspected for mechanical integrity. Its sophisticated profile and consistent service history ensure a driving experience that meets our dealership's exacting standards for quality and roadworthiness.
